completed_tasks.name: wire description through HTML/Markdown/dashboard/JSON consumers + E2E tests
CI grep gate + docs purge + UAT-48 + Obsidian sync + phase note

decisions.decision: _build_finding helper as sole producer in risk_engine.py
decisions.rationale: Single chokepoint guarantees non-empty description + canonical NIST IR 8547 phrase + FIPS-only recommendations; deterministic suffix append preserves _dedupe_findings keying

decisions.decision: Preserve recommendation (engine) vs remediation (dashboard DTO) field-name asymmetry
decisions.rationale: Domain seam — engine emits raw scanner advice; dashboard DTO presents UI-reworded text. Unifying would either coarsen engine or pre-couple to UI

decisions.decision: CI grep gate as durable invariant for PQC terminology
decisions.rationale: Turns one-time docs purge into permanent guardrail. Sanity-tested live: injecting 'kyber' fails the gate; reverting passes. Future regressions cannot merge
Reproduce identically at pre-Phase-48 commit 386e1bd; root cause is Phase 46 chaos-lab profile registration gap (PROFILE_ENDPOINTS missing tls-cert-defects), not a Phase 48 regression

next_action: Decide next: /gsd-plan-phase 49 (Compliance Mapping — depends on stabilized FIPS 203/204/205 strings from this phase) OR /gsd-progress for v4.6 milestone status. Commit 48-VERIFICATION.md as part of pause WIP.
context_notes: Phase 48 closed cleanly: 3 waves sequential (producer -> consumers -> CI gate + docs), 41 phase-48 tests pass, zero new regressions vs pre-existing 19-failure CBOM-schema baseline. Verifier independently confirmed each CONTEXT-01..04 with file/line evidence and a live gate sanity-test. Obsidian phase note + UAT-Series mirror + guides synced to vault Digs at 20_Dev-Work/QUIRK. Branch QUIRK-v4. SDK ergonomics gap noted by 48-03 executor: state.add-decision and state.record-metric argv shapes rejected positional/JSON/key=value forms — direct STATE.md edits used as fallback; worth a follow-up SDK fix but does not block Phase 49.
